creator: NirDiamant

evidence.text: about a friend who forgets every conversation you've ever had. Every morning you're strangers again. That's what most AI agents are like today. Every AI agent eventually hits the same wall: **it forgets**. In 2026, AI agents are everywhere. But most of them still forget what you told them yesterday. Without strong memory, an agent can't keep context across conversations. It can't learn from past chats. It can't build a lasting relationship with you. The landscape is shifting fast: - **Anthropic's 7 Layers of Memory** (March 2026): from conversation context to cross-project knowledge, defining the memory hierarc
